$comment: Canonical LKOS matter naming standard. Consumed by src/common/Lkos.Naming.ps1 and all provisioning paths. Pattern: 'Matter Number - Client Last Name - Short Description'.

ClientLastName.description: Client's last name (or organization short name).

ShortDescription.description: Brief matter descriptor, e.g. 'MVA Personal Injury'.

constraints.$comment: Applied to the final assembled display name. SharePoint/Teams disallow these characters in site/team names.

derived.$comment: URL/alias-safe identifiers derived from the matter number for site URL and mail nickname.
derived.slugRule: lowercase; replace any run of non [a-z0-9] with single hyphen; trim leading/trailing hyphens
